articles.title: Salesian pupils return from Lourdes pilgrimage 2026
articles.summary: Year 9 students and staff returned from the annual Lourdes pilgrimage this week, following four days of service, reflection, and community with pilgrims from across Europe. The trip, a cornerstone of the Salesian tradition, saw students assist those in need and deepen their understanding of the school's Catholic values.
articles.body:
Year 9 students and staff returned from the annual Lourdes pilgrimage this week, following four days of service, reflection, and community with pilgrims from across Europe.

The trip, a cornerstone of the Salesian tradition, saw students assist those in need and deepen their understanding of the school's Catholic values. Students spoke of the profound impact the experience had on them personally.

articles.title: County sports champions — another year of sporting excellence
articles.summary: Our football and athletics teams brought home county titles this term, continuing a strong tradition of sporting achievement across the school.
articles.body: Our football and athletics teams brought home county titles this term, continuing a strong tradition of sporting achievement across the school.

articles.title: A-Level results: another outstanding year for Sixth Form leavers
articles.summary: Sixth Form students celebrated exceptional A-Level results, with the vast majority securing places at their first-choice universities.
articles.body: Sixth Form students celebrated exceptional A-Level results, with the vast majority securing places at their first-choice universities.

articles.title: ISI inspection confirms Salesian as an exceptional school
articles.summary: Inspectors from the Independent Schools Inspectorate praised the outstanding quality of pupils' personal development and the exceptional learning culture throughout the school.
articles.body: Inspectors from the Independent Schools Inspectorate praised the outstanding quality of pupils' personal development and the exceptional learning culture throughout the school.

articles.title: New Apple Distinguished School status awarded to Salesian
articles.summary: Salesian College has been recognised as an Apple Distinguished School for the third consecutive year, celebrating innovation in teaching and learning with technology.
articles.body: Salesian College has been recognised as an Apple Distinguished School for the third consecutive year, celebrating innovation in teaching and learning with technology.

articles.title: Year 7 entrance examinations — a record number of applicants
articles.summary: Over 400 boys sat the Year 7 entrance examination this January, reflecting the school's outstanding reputation in the region.
articles.body: Over 400 boys sat the Year 7 entrance examination this January, reflecting the school's outstanding reputation in the region.

articles.title: Christmas concert raises over £2,000 for local charities
articles.summary: Pupils, staff, and families came together at the annual Christmas concert, with all proceeds donated to charities supported by the Salesian community.
articles.body: Pupils, staff, and families came together at the annual Christmas concert, with all proceeds donated to charities supported by the Salesian community.
